assertions.reason: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN appears exactly once in .env after migration without --overwrite. Original value (ORIGINAL-TOKEN-99999) preserved, source value (NEW-TOKEN-12345) not appended as duplicate. The updateEnvFile() fix correctly tracks keys in updatedKeys set in the else branch.
evidence: grep -oE '^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*=' | sort | uniq -d returns empty (no duplicate keys at all)

evidence: No duplicate keys found across entire .env file
